meaning: n.荳榊插陦｡,荳肴姝豈比ｾ久t.菴ｿ荳榊插陦｡,菴ｿ荳榊ｯｹ遘ｰ
examples: Thee great proof of madness is the disproportion of one's designs to one's means.
His secret consists in being able to find the exact point where they meet in their greatest disproportion.
It seems to me that you've got disproportion of lots of men, can your campaign to increase the proportion of women?
The disproportion between effort and effect makes the picture seem a little silly, though.
in a country where only 30 percent of the population is white men.
